name: Jade Guardian
short_description: Jade Guardian - You take on the role of an unusual guardian made from precious jade who goes on a dangerous adventure to return stolen magical signs.
detailed_description:
Jade Guardian - You take on the role of an unusual guardian made from precious jade who goes on a dangerous adventure to return stolen magical signs. You will explore ancient ruins, unexplored dungeons and mystical places to find the source of the evil that has stolen sacred objects.

The game is a 2D platformer with puzzle elements. Your main task is to destroy enemies in the location and complete quests.

Your path will be filled with dangers, mysteries and enemies ready to stop you at any cost. Will you be able to overcome the challenges and return the signs to their rightful place, or will you plunge into the abyss of betrayal and darkness, facing the terrible consequences of the stolen treasures?
